name: tl-art-tool-usage-analytics
description: Independent usage analytics platform scaffold for TL art tools.

scripts.test:usage-emulator: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-tl-art-tool-usage-analytics "npm run test:usage-emulator --workspace @tl-art-tool-usage-analytics/functions"
scripts.test:portal-emulator: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-tl-art-tool-usage-analytics "npm run test:portal-emulator --workspace @tl-art-tool-usage-analytics/functions"
scripts.test:all-emulators: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-tl-art-tool-usage-analytics "npm run test:emulator --workspace @tl-art-tool-usage-analytics/functions"
scripts.test:plugin-auth-emulator: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore --project demo-tl-art-tool-usage-analytics "npm run test:plugin-auth-emulator:inner"
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:functions
scripts.verify:core: npm run test:structure && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:plugin-auth && npm run test:usage && npm run test:plugin-pairing-web && npm run test:portal && node --test tests/web/e2e-gate.contract.test.mjs && npm run test:pages-deployment-gates && npm run build:web && npm run test:pages-artifacts && npm run build:functions
scripts.verify: npm run verify:core && npm run test:e2e
scripts.verify:production: npm run test:rules && npm run test:all-emulators
